name: Recommendation Suitable
description: AI-supported recommendations are subject to a suitability assessment aligning them to the client's situation, objectives, sustainability preferences, risk tolerance, and knowledge.
rationale: ESMA ¶20: in the assessment of suitability, recommendations and decisions must align with the client's financial situation, investment objectives (including sustainability preferences and risk tolerance), and knowledge and experience.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
